content.query:
DROP TABLE [RDM].[REF_PRODUCT_ZIP_CODES]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [RDM].[REF_PRODUCT_ZIP_CODES]
( 
	[Division] [nvarchar](100)  NOT NULL,
	[Product] [nvarchar](100)  NOT NULL,
	[ZipCode] [nvarchar](100)  NOT NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
